name: minti-indexer
description: Live Monad chain indexer for minti.art. Continuous polling via public RPCs, Postgres source of truth, Hono API.
_supplyChain: All dependency versions are pinned EXACT (no ^ or ~). Each was selected as the most recent version that (a) patches all known CVEs at install time and (b) has been live on npm for at least 7 days, per our supply-chain policy. Renovate (renovate.json) enforces the same 7-day stability window for future updates. Always use `npm ci` (not `npm install`) in production / CI to install from the lockfile verbatim.
